sections.name: Dashboard
sections.description: Stats cards, productivity bar chart, recent activity feed

sections.name: Projects
sections.description: 6 project cards with progress bars and status badges

sections.name: Workspace
sections.description: Rich text editor with toolbar and sidebar metadata panel

sections.name: Kanban
sections.description: 4-column board (Backlog, To Do, In Progress, Done) with 12 cards

sections.name: Whiteboard
sections.description: Canvas with draggable nodes, SVG connections, drawing toolbar

sections.name: Schema
sections.description: 3 database table schemas (Projects, Ideas, Tasks) with field definitions

sections.name: Directory Tree
sections.description: Collapsible file/folder tree with file sizes and nested structure

sections.name: Ideas
sections.description: 8 idea cards with search, priority badges, tags, and authorship

sections.name: AI Chat
sections.description: 6 chat messages with AI/user avatars, input area with send button

sections.name: Settings
sections.description: 5-tab settings panel (Profile, Appearance, Notifications, Integrations, Billing)
